Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons)
Identification.ShortTitle: An Act to amend An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons) so that certain sections of that Act can come into force on different days.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Heading.TitleText: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons)

Section.Text: Section 5 of An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons) is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: Sections 1, 2 and 4 come into force on the day on which a Bill entitled An Act to amend An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons), introduced in the 1st session of the 42nd Parliament, receives royal assent.
Section 3 comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.

ExplanatoryNote.TitleText: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (exploitation and trafficking in persons)
ExplanatoryNote.Label: Clause 1:

Text.Emphasis: This Act comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
